name: Guru API
what_it_does: Enterprise knowledge management platform with REST API for creating, searching, and organizing verified company knowledge cards integrated with Slack, Chrome, and business workflows.
use_cases: Querying internal knowledge cards for agent context enrichment (customer FAQs, runbooks, policies)
Creating knowledge cards programmatically when agents complete research tasks
Searching for relevant documentation snippets to include in customer-facing agent responses
Tracking which knowledge cards are stale or unverified via verification schedules
Syncing knowledge updates from external sources into Guru cards automatically
best_when: An agent needs access to verified, structured company knowledge to answer internal questions accurately with high confidence.
avoid_when: Your team is smaller than 20 people or you need freeform document collaboration rather than verified knowledge cards.

auth.notes: Basic auth with API token or OAuth2 for user-level access. Tokens created per-user from settings. No fine-grained permission scopes beyond user role.

pricing.notes: Pricing per seat with minimum team sizes. Enterprise plans include SSO, advanced analytics, and custom integrations.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests/minute per token; documented in API docs

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation covers card CRUD and search. Error responses are JSON with descriptive messages. The search API supports full-text queries making it agent-friendly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Card creation accepts external IDs for idempotent upserts. Search is naturally idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit of 100 req/min may be hit during bulk operations
Knowledge card content is in HTML, not plain text — agents need HTML parsing
Card verification status is critical: unverified cards may have outdated information
Search relevance tuning requires understanding Guru's card-based search model

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II and HIPAA compliant. OAuth2 for user-level access. US-hosted. SSO integration available on Enterprise plan. No MFA enforcement at API level.
